title: CI/CD and Observability
learningObjectives: Explain **CI/CD and observability** with production trade-offs, SLO thinking, and failure modes
Implement small **Java** snippets that anchor interview whiteboard discussions
Connect **observability** and **capacity** signals to real operational decisions
Identify common **pitfalls** that cause incidents or cost surprises at scale
Compare alternatives using **constraints** (latency, cost, team skills, compliance)
Present answers with **structure**: problem, options, decision, verification

sections.title: Why CI/CD and Observability matters
sections.content: Shipping safely is **CI/CD**; understanding incidents is **observability**. Senior engineers connect **pipelines**, **SLOs**, and **tracing** into one coherent reliability story.

sections.title: Theory and Internals - CI/CD and Observability
sections.content:
### Day 76 — **CI/CD** & **observability**

### 1. Pipeline stages
**Build**, **test**, **security** scan, **deploy**, **verify**.

### 2. Progressive delivery
**Canary**, **blue/green**, **feature** flags.

### 3. Telemetry
**Metrics**, **logs**, **traces** correlation.

### 4. SLO culture
**Error** budgets drive prioritization.

### 5. Developer experience
Fast feedback without skipping gates.

### 6. Story
Deploy **ok** but **SLO** burn—rollback via **automated** canary analysis.

sections.title: Basic — Three pillars
sections.output: metrics: aggregates; logs: events; traces: request causality

sections.title: Intermediate — Pipeline checks
sections.output: after deploy: compare error rate latency saturation vs pre-deploy baseline

sections.title: Advanced — SLO one-liner
sections.output: SLO error budget: allowed unreliability before freeze features

sections.title: Trace across services
Exercise — CI/CD and Observability (Day 76 assignment)
sections.problem:
Print **exactly** two lines:
1. Implemented: CI/CD & Observability
2. Focus: Pipeline plus metrics/traces/logs rollout checks.

sections.title: Interview Drill

conceptual.question: What makes a **pipeline** **production** grade?
conceptual.answer: Tests, artifacts, signing, progressive rollout, rollback, audit trail. Contrast **happy** **path** docs with **partition** behavior: **split** **retries**, **half-open** **probes**, **degraded** **read** modes, and **idempotency** keys that prevent **duplicate** **writes**. Mention **verification**: **`curl -v`** through **gateway**, **`kubectl logs`**, **APM** **waterfall** **spans**, and **dashboards** that slice **p99** by **downstream** **service** **name**.

followUps.question: Production follow-up: which **dashboards** or **metrics** expose this for **CI/CD and observability**?
followUps.answer: Start with **client** **outbound** **histograms** and **resilience4j** **circuitbreaker** **state** **gauges**, then open **distributed** **traces** filtered by **service** **name** and **route**. Tests, artifacts, signing, progressive rollout, rollback, audit trail. Interviewers reward naming **metrics** (`http_client_requests_seconds`, `resilience4j_circuitbreaker_state`), **trace** correlation IDs, and **rollback** criteria rather than hand-wavy resilience claims. Tie answers to **Spring** reality: **Feign** + **LoadBalancer**, **WebClient** + **`ExchangeFilterFunction`**, **Resilience4j** registries, and **Micrometer** tags that make **on-call** searches fast.

followUps.question: How do you **roll out** a policy change here without a **retry** **storm**?
followUps.answer: Use **feature** **flags**, **canary** **deployments**, **tight** **retry** **budgets** on **non-idempotent** calls, and **verify** with **load** tests that **match** **production** **fan-out**. Tests, artifacts, signing, progressive rollout, rollback, audit trail. Mention **verification**: **`curl -v`** through **gateway**, **`kubectl logs`**, **APM** **waterfall** **spans**, and **dashboards** that slice **p99** by **downstream** **service** **name**. Senior answers separate **symptom** from **root** **cause**: **502** at **edge** can be **empty** **Endpoints**, **stale** **pool**, or **upstream** **panic**—each needs different **first** **commands**.

conceptual.question: **SLO** vs **monitoring** dashboard pretty charts?
conceptual.answer: SLO ties alerts to customer impact and error budgets. Communicate **executive**-friendly **impact**: **customer** **minutes** degraded, **error** **budget** burn, **mitigation** **ETA**, and **post-incident** **themes** mapped to **roadmap** work. Reference **security**: **mTLS** **service** identity, **OAuth2** **scopes**, **audit** logs at **edge**, and why **secrets** never belong in **Feign** **URL** query strings.

followUps.question: Production follow-up: which **dashboards** or **metrics** expose this for **CI/CD and observability**?
followUps.answer: Start with **client** **outbound** **histograms** and **resilience4j** **circuitbreaker** **state** **gauges**, then open **distributed** **traces** filtered by **service** **name** and **route**. SLO ties alerts to customer impact and error budgets. Senior answers separate **symptom** from **root** **cause**: **502** at **edge** can be **empty** **Endpoints**, **stale** **pool**, or **upstream** **panic**—each needs different **first** **commands**. Call out **ownership**: **platform** **SRE** for **mesh**/**certs**, **service** teams for **timeout** policy, **SRE** for **SLO** **burn** **alerts**—and how those teams **coordinate** during **sev-1** calls.

followUps.question: How do you **roll out** a policy change here without a **retry** **storm**?
followUps.answer: Use **feature** **flags**, **canary** **deployments**, **tight** **retry** **budgets** on **non-idempotent** calls, and **verify** with **load** tests that **match** **production** **fan-out**. SLO ties alerts to customer impact and error budgets. Reference **security**: **mTLS** **service** identity, **OAuth2** **scopes**, **audit** logs at **edge**, and why **secrets** never belong in **Feign** **URL** query strings. Contrast **happy** **path** docs with **partition** behavior: **split** **retries**, **half-open** **probes**, **degraded** **read** modes, and **idempotency** keys that prevent **duplicate** **writes**.

conceptual.question: **RED** / **USE** methods quick meaning?
conceptual.answer: Rate errors duration for services; utilization saturation errors for resources. When **Kubernetes** is involved, cite **readiness**, **HPA**, **NetworkPolicy**, and **Service** **DNS** as factors that change **latency** independent of **Java** **code**. For **gateway** and **service** stacks, emphasize **timeout** ordering (**outer > inner**), **bulkheads** per **tenant**, and **JWT** **cache** **TTL** during **issuer** rotations.

conceptual.answer: Connect Feign/WebClient spans across hops; find slow dependency. seniorScenario.question: **Incident:** **CI/CD and Observability** deploy correlates with **5xx** spike.
seniorScenario.answer:
**(1) Immediate response** Freeze risky changes; open **SLO** dashboard.

**(2) Root cause** **Config** regression or **dependency** **saturation**.

**(3) Fix** Rollback or **toggle** **flag**; restore **SLO** then root-cause.

**(4) Prevention** Add **canary** gate and **diff** **alerts** on **golden** metrics. Close with **prevention**: **contract** tests for **clients**, **SLO** alerts on **client-side** **error** rates, **game** days that **kill** **pods** during **business** hours in **staging**, and **lint** rules banning **blocking** calls on **reactor** threads. When **Kubernetes** is involved, cite **readiness**, **HPA**, **NetworkPolicy**, and **Service** **DNS** as factors that change **latency** independent of **Java** **code**. For **gateway** and **service** stacks, emphasize **timeout** ordering (**outer > inner**), **bulkheads** per **tenant**, and **JWT** **cache** **TTL** during **issuer** rotations. Communicate **executive**-friendly **impact**: **customer** **minutes** degraded, **error** **budget** burn, **mitigation** **ETA**, and **post-incident** **themes** mapped to **roadmap** work. Reference **security**: **mTLS** **service** identity, **OAuth2** **scopes**, **audit** logs at **edge**, and why **secrets** never belong in **Feign** **URL** query strings.

followUps.question: How do you **communicate** **impact** and **ETA** during this incident?
followUps.answer: Share **SLO** **burn**, **customer** **regions** affected, **mitigation** steps in flight, and **explicit** unknowns. Avoid **blaming** **users**; focus on **measurable** recovery criteria. Explain **second-order** effects: **retry** amplification, **queue** growth, **thread** **pool** exhaustion, and **cost** of extra **hops** when **edge** dependencies like **Redis** rate-limit stores fail. Close with **prevention**: **contract** tests for **clients**, **SLO** alerts on **client-side** **error** rates, **game** days that **kill** **pods** during **business** hours in **staging**, and **lint** rules banning **blocking** calls on **reactor** threads.

followUps.question: Which **post-incident** **action** items are **non-negotiable**?
followUps.answer: At minimum: **runbook** update, **dashboard** gap closed, **test** that **reproduces** the failure, and **owner** with **deadline**. Tie themes to **error** **budget** policy. Explain **second-order** effects: **retry** amplification, **queue** growth, **thread** **pool** exhaustion, and **cost** of extra **hops** when **edge** dependencies like **Redis** rate-limit stores fail. Close with **prevention**: **contract** tests for **clients**, **SLO** alerts on **client-side** **error** rates, **game** days that **kill** **pods** during **business** hours in **staging**, and **lint** rules banning **blocking** calls on **reactor** threads.

sections.title: Cheatsheet
sections.content:
| Topic | Recall |
|---|---|
| CI | Fast feedback |
| CD | Safe promote |
| Canary | Risk reduction |
| SLO | Customer centric |
| RED | Microservice signals |
| USE | Resource signals |
| OTel | Vendor neutral |
| Structured logs | Query speed |
| Feature flags | Progressive enable |
| Error budget | Prioritization |
